did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a narrative review synthesizing existing literature on AI in melanoma diagnosis (2020-2025). It does not present original experimental results obtained by applying AI methods; rather, it discusses the state of the field, including CNNs, Vision Transformers, and multimodal models, as reported in other studies.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
